rule: No execution until intraday data-contract gate and explicit run authorization exist.
Only first 15m RTH tape oracle may define direction before entry.
Net intraday return after 500 bps on positive-oracle candidates.
Fail if gross edge does not survive 500 bps round-trip cost model.
No promotion if trade_count < 30; exploratory report only.
No promotion unless DSR >= 0.95 after effective trial accounting.
Fail if sign flips after removing top three winners.
Promotion is impossible in this preregistration artifact.
Stop if any future label or XMOM PnL is used to choose thresholds.
